summary: Growth Activation readiness controls with route-aware successful-send page-view tracking; legal, Search Console, Bing and sitemap evidence are recorded while GA4 and Production activation remain pending.

planApproval.reference: APPROVE PLAN: Phase 11 Unit 3 Growth Activation with clarifications

evidence.reference: Existing non-modal consent accessibility contracts remain in the passing 63-test Chromium suite; owner REVIEW remains pending.
Page-view readiness, successful-send deduplication and existing analytics contracts passed in the 304-test local suite.
git diff --check passed and scope inspection found no utility, registry, sitemap, crawler, brand or dependency change.
Consent remains explicit, Production-only and provider-free in Local and Preview; withdrawal contracts remain unchanged.

Owner accepts the qualified review and final activation wording for Portugal and the EU/EEA. privacy@youtoola.com is operational and monitored. Search Console, Bing and sitemap evidence are recorded; GA4, Vercel variables and Production activation remain pending.
Growth activation, foundation, monitoring and dashboard contract tests passed locally.
The protected design-system review route and unavailable Production-mode behavior remain covered by passing tests.
npm audit reported zero vulnerabilities; no dependency changed.
package-lock.json and dependency declarations are unchanged.
Local E2E and protected Preview inspection showed no Measurement ID or Google provider request.
Production-only analytics configuration and Local/Preview rejection contracts remain validated.
Activation validation rejects unknown fields and premature active and activation-ready transitions.
Local lint, strict type-check, 304 unit tests, 63 Chromium tests and Production build passed; hosted exact-head checks remain delivery fields pending.
APPROVE PLAN: Phase 11 Unit 3 Growth Activation with clarifications
Existing bounded analytics payload contracts remain green; Unit 3 creates no utility event.

Draft PR #19 deployment dpl_9QtzsKABoJVqtYbshSZxLoNqmqxP matched implementation head 3b031963c4f7dbbaaedc5d0a00da2cbd61dff80c, was Ready and authentication-protected, returned noindex, nofollow, and exposed no Measurement ID or Google provider origin.

Owner accepts qualified review YT-PRIV-2026-07-15-01 / envelope PT99T0-1300-BG, reviewed by Bruno Lopez Martinho of Plen Advogados on 2026-07-15, for Portugal and the EU/EEA. The accepted record names Plen Advogados as controller and requires future-provider blocking plus _ga and _ga_* cookie expiry on withdrawal.
Existing analytics plain-object and unknown-field validation remains in the passing suite.
Direct gtag.js remains isolated to the existing adapter; no provider code or identifier was added.
No utility, registry, public route, sitemap, crawler, brand or monetisation boundary changed.
Existing redirect and canonical allowlist tests remain green.

BUILD report records a legally-approved candidate with verified Search Console and Bing ownership and processed sitemap evidence. GA4, complete external configuration, owner REVIEW and SHIP remain pending.
Disable both Production analytics variables, verify provider silence and align source through protected main; current Ready Production remains the target until SHIP evidence exists.
Sanitized page views retain canonical allowlisted URLs, authored titles and no query, fragment or referrer.
Activation records contain no Measurement ID, account identity, credential, token or recovery material.
Repository secret scan passed before candidate record creation.

Preview retains report-only provider-free CSP and noindex headers. Live Production /privacy returned HTTP 200, HTML UTF-8, report-only CSP without Google origins, no Set-Cookie, required security headers and Vercel cache HIT.
BUILD review found no new provider, credential, external request, persistence or activation path.
Existing sensitive analytics field rejection remains green and Unit 3 creates no synthetic utility event.

Owner-verified evidence records Search Console Domain property youtoola.com via DNS TXT and Bing youtoola.com via Search Console import. Both are verified; both successfully processed https://www.youtoola.com/sitemap.xml and discovered five URLs. All five public URLs passed live inspection and are technically indexable; indexing was requested where needed, while actual indexed status remains pending.
Successful-send page-view state is ephemeral; no buffer, retry, replay or storage was introduced.

rollbackPlan.method: Disable both Production analytics variables, verify provider silence, then revert the Unit 3 merge through protected main if activation defects occur.

evidence: APPROVE PLAN: Phase 11 Unit 3 Growth Activation with clarifications
Two scoped implementation commits and complete local validation
